prompt: List the Awwwards SOTD/Site-of-the-Month, Godly, and CSS Design Awards winning or featured DARK B2B, developer-tool, infrastructure, or SECURITY sites from 2025-2026. For each winner: site name + URL, the studio/designer credited, and SPECIFICALLY what won — the hero technique, type system, motion signature, material treatment — per the jury notes or the designer's own breakdown. Prioritize anything security/trust/forensics/crypto-adjacent. Quote award citations or designer posts verbatim (@handle + date) with links. The output should be a study list: 8-15 named sites with the one or two replicable moves each contributes.
content:
**Here is a curated study list of relevant 2025–2026 Awwwards SOTD winners (and one CSS Design Awards WOTD) in the dark B2B / infrastructure / blockchain / developer-tool / security-adjacent space.** Exact matches for pure “security/forensics” sites are limited in public award coverage for this narrow window, so I prioritized infrastructure, data-center/energy, and blockchain platforms that emphasize trust, technical precision, and dark palettes.[[1]](https://www.awwwards.com/sites/hut-8)[[2]](https://www.awwwards.com/sites/avax-network-1)

I focused on replicable moves drawn from award announcements, studio case studies, and social mentions (jury notes are often brief on Awwwards; details come from credited studios and posts). No comprehensive “Godly” awards hits appeared in results for these categories/themes.

**1. Hut 8 (hut8.com)**  
- **Studio/Designer**: Studio 28K (Creative Directors Jonas Emmertsen et al.) + Julien Renau (motion/3D).  
- **Award**: Awwwards SOTD, Oct 28, 2025.[[1]](https://www.awwwards.com/sites/hut-8)  
- **What won / replicable moves**: Scroll-driven 3D storytelling through “Power, Digital Infrastructure and Compute” sections with alive-feeling animations; precise turbine/blade modular identity system (24 blades configurable as roofline/infrastructure, server racks, or microchips) that unifies sub-brands while nodding to real hardware. Moves beyond crypto clichés into institutional dark territory with technical polish and personality. Replicable: parametric/modular 3D asset systems tied to physical infrastructure metaphors + layered scroll narratives.[[3]](https://the-brandidentity.com/project/studio-28k-moves-hut-8-beyond-crypto-clich%C3%A9s-into-institutional-territory)[[4]](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DQgYU2eleZF/)

**2. ON Energy (on.energy)**  
- **Studio/Designer**: Studio 28K (Ruud Luijten credited in posts; team includes Lisa Odette Jérôme, Eugene Sokolovski, UX/UI roles).  
- **Award**: Awwwards SOTD, Mar 9, 2026 (score 7.44).[[5]](https://www.awwwards.com/sites/on-energy)  
- **What won / replicable moves**: Dark, robust presentation of critical infrastructure (energy storage + smart controls for data centers/HPC, outage protection). Same studio’s signature precise, technical dark aesthetic and motion language as Hut 8. Replicable: calm, high-trust dark UI with subtle engineering cues and infrastructure-focused motion that signals reliability/stability.[[6]](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ruudluijten_we-just-won-site-of-the-day-on-awwwards-activity-7436725570161311744-VrKS)

**3. Avax.network (avax.network)**  
- **Studio/Designer**: Wonder Makers.  
- **Award**: Awwwards SOTD, Jul 26, 2025 (score 7.33; strong creativity/usability marks).[[2]](https://www.awwwards.com/sites/avax-network-1)  
- **What won / replicable moves**: Clean dark blockchain/developer platform site supporting builders; emphasis on real-world value and custom L1s. Replicable: clear, builder-focused navigation and visual hierarchy in dark mode that balances technical depth with accessibility (high Design/Creativity scores).[[2]](https://www.awwwards.com/sites/avax-network-1)

**4. Apechain (apechain site on Awwwards)**  
- **Studio/Designer**: makemepulse.  
- **Award**: Awwwards SOTD, ~June 2026.[[7]](https://www.facebook.com/awwwards/videos/todays-sotd-goes-to-makemepulse-for-apechainhttpswwwawwwardscomsitesapechainapec/3383261951844712/)  
- **What won / replicable moves**: Transforms blockchain into a “cultural playground” with 3D and interaction-heavy design. Replicable: playful-yet-serious 3D motion and cultural layering on top of infrastructure themes to humanize developer/blockchain tools.[[7]](https://www.facebook.com/awwwards/videos/todays-sotd-goes-to-makemepulse-for-apechainhttpswwwawwwardscomsitesapechainapec/3383261951844712/)

**5. Steven.com (steven-com on Awwwards)**  
- **Studio/Designer**: OFF+BRAND.  
- **Award**: Awwwards SOTD (~June 2026 context).[[8]](https://www.facebook.com/awwwards/posts/todays-sotd-goes-to-offbrand-for-stevencom-an-immersive-experience-exploring-ste/1306983768217805/)  
- **What won / replicable moves**: Immersive experience for creator-economy ecosystem (crypto/XR/gaming/AI adjacency). Replicable: deep, narrative-driven immersion in dark palettes for complex B2B/creator platforms.[[8]](https://www.facebook.com/awwwards/posts/todays-sotd-goes-to-offbrand-for-stevencom-an-immersive-experience-exploring-ste/1306983768217805/)

**6. OROSWAP (orowap / crypto swap site)**  
- **Studio/Designer**: u1core.bureau (per Instagram).  
- **Award**: CSS Design Awards Website of the Day (multiple categories including Best Innovation; noted for earning trust via design).[[9]](https://www.instagram.com/p/DX7BV3JF_TN/?img_index=2)  
- **What won / replicable moves**: “Good design earns recognition. Great design earns trust.” Dark fintech/crypto swap with innovation focus. Replicable: trust-building UI/UX + innovation layers in dark crypto interfaces.[[9]](https://www.instagram.com/p/DX7BV3JF_TN/?img_index=2)

**Additional notes / replicable patterns across winners**  
- **Dark palette + technical precision**: High-contrast dark modes paired with engineering metaphors (turbines, blades, data flows) to signal security/trust without cliché neon crypto looks.  
- **3D + scroll-driven motion**: Alive 3D elements and parametric/modular systems that reveal infrastructure stories progressively.  
- **Institutional refinement**: Moving blockchain/infra sites away from “crypto bro” aesthetics toward calm, professional B2B trust (Studio 28K examples excel here).  
- **Builder/developer focus**: Clear hubs, performance cues, and subtle security/compliance signals (badges, smooth flows).  

Fewer pure forensics/security winners surfaced in 2025–2026 public results than infrastructure/blockchain; the above represent the strongest documented matches. For deeper jury quotes, check individual Awwwards site pages or studio LinkedIn/Instagram posts (e.g., Studio 28K and makemepulse announcements). Expand searches on Awwwards “Sites of the Day” archives or CSSDA galleries for additional dark B2B nominees.
